title: Top Bought Commodities
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MarketBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Type_Localised, 'Unknown') AS label, CAST(SUM(TotalCost) AS INTEGER) AS value FROM MarketBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Type_Localised ORDER BY value DESC
